name: Glaze
description: Glossy 'wet jelly' contour-gel — a faithful port of the Milkdrop preset `Flexi + stahlregen - jelly showoff parade`: nested concentric contour-ring striations under a thick 3-level blur-pyramid emboss 'wet gel' sheen, a saturated neon palette that slowly rotates, on an accreting feedback field. A 3-mass damped spring-mass 'jelly' — anchored by bass↔other stem opposition (lateral) and overall fullness (lift) — drags a radial swirl-poke across the field (the catalog's physics-of-the-beat body); per-stem accents give drums a poke 'punch' and vocals a gentle glow, with a display-only HDR glossy bloom on the bright highlights. The connection lands on a discrete downbeat camera push: on the cached-grid downbeat the whole field lunges toward the viewer then settles. See docs/presets/GLAZE_PLAN.md.
author: Matt

inspired_by.source_form: butterchurn-presets built-in (pre-converted; no .milk file on disk, sha256 unavailable)
